name: vertik12
description: Vertik12 — Global K-12 Student Information Management System. Powered by CloudPunkt.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @vertik12/api" "npm run dev -w @vertik12/web"
scripts.dev:3005: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @vertik12/api" "npm run dev:3005 -w @vertik12/web"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
